_description: Tabulated EPref values (kWh/m2/yr electrical) for SI 5282 Part 1 (2024 amendment).
_source: Zones A, B, and C: not yet calibrated — use reference-box simulation as fallback.
_notes: EPref = reference HVAC energy / COP / area, averaged over 4 cardinal orientations.
Small unit threshold: area <= 50 m2 uses higher EPref (more wall area per m2).
Floor type 'top' applies to units with roof exposed to outdoors (may not coincide with highest floor number — setback or penthouse units).
Middle-floor units above unconditioned space may receive a higher EPref at the engineer's discretion.
Zone A = Mediterranean coastal (Tel Aviv, Haifa, Ashkelon) → Standard Part 1 Zone A.
Zone B = Hot-arid desert (Eilat, Beersheba, Sedom) → Standard Part 1 Zone D.
Zone C = Highland (Jerusalem, Safed) → Standard Part 1 Zone C.
